summary: Media Posting Permission feature testing complete. Backend APIs fully functional (10/10 tests pass). Admin panel UI verified - shows Global Media Settings with master toggle + per-image + per-video toggles. Victory Lane components correctly check media permissions.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: admin_routes.py correctly implements global settings (allow_media_posts, allow_image_posts, allow_video_posts)
Backend: media_upload_routes.py correctly checks global settings before allowing uploads (403 if disabled)
Backend: /api/user/media-permissions correctly combines global AND per-user permissions
Frontend: SystemSettings.js shows all 3 toggles with data-testid attributes for testing
Frontend: PostComposer.js shows 'Media disabled' text when neither canPostImages nor canPostVideos is true
Frontend: CreatePostFAB.js shows 'Media uploads disabled by administrator' for mobile users

success_rate.frontend: 90% - Admin UI verified via Playwright, Victory Lane PostComposer not tested due to auth flow

context_for_next_testing_agent: Media permissions feature is complete. Global settings stored in platform_settings collection with type='victory_lane'. Default is all false (disabled). Admin panel at /admin/dashboard -> System Settings shows the Global Media Settings UI. PostComposer shows 'Media disabled' when user cannot post media. The login form uses 'username' field but API expects 'email' - this may cause login issues in Playwright tests.

backend_api_tests.GET /api/settings/media-allowed: PASS - Returns global media settings (default: all false)
backend_api_tests.POST /api/admin/settings: PASS - Saves global media settings correctly
backend_api_tests.GET /api/user/media-permissions unauthen: PASS - Returns media_disabled_globally=true when global off
backend_api_tests.GET /api/user/media-permissions global_o: PASS - Returns permissions when both enabled
PASS - Returns false when per-user disabled
backend_api_tests.POST /api/media/upload global_disabled: PASS - Returns 403 when global media disabled

frontend_ui_tests.admin_panel_system_settings: PASS - Global Media Settings UI found with all 3 toggles
frontend_ui_tests.per_user_permissions_table: PASS - Shows users with Images/Videos/Disabled toggles
frontend_ui_tests.warning_message_when_disabled: PASS - Shows 'Media uploads are disabled globally' message

feature_verification.global_toggle_enables_media: Verified - POST /api/admin/settings saves settings, GET reflects changes
feature_verification.per_user_permissions_respected: Verified - /api/user/media-permissions combines global AND per-user settings
feature_verification.admin_ui_shows_toggles: Verified - SystemSettings.js renders Global Media Settings with 3 toggles
feature_verification.victory_lane_shows_disabled: Code verified - PostComposer.js line 94-99 shows 'Media disabled' when !canPostImages && !canPostVideos
